tasks.label: 1. Configure Project
tasks.command: echo '${input:target}' > .target_config; if ('${input:target}' -eq 'stm32g431') { cmake -S . -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE='${workspaceFolder}/cmake/arm-none-eabi-toolchain.cmake' } else { cmake -S . -B build-host -G Ninja -DPLATFORM=host -DBUILD_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug }

tasks.label: 2. Build Project
tasks.command: $target = Get-Content .target_config -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (!$target) { Write-Error 'Please run Configure first!'; exit 1 }; if ($target -eq 'stm32g431') { cmake --build build } elseif ($target -eq 'SIL-Simulation') { cmake --build build-host --target system_test } else { cmake --build build-host --target unit_tests }

tasks.label: 3. Flash / Run
tasks.command: $target = Get-Content .target_config -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (!$target) { Write-Error 'Please run Configure first!'; exit 1 }; if ($target -eq 'stm32g431') { & 'C:\Program Files\STMicroelectronics\STM32Cube\STM32CubeProgrammer\bin\STM32_Programmer_CLI.exe' -c port=SWD -w '${workspaceFolder}\build\platform\pmsm_foc_platform.elf' -v -rst } elseif ($target -eq 'SIL-Simulation') { & '${workspaceFolder}\build-host\tests\sim\system_test.exe' -s } else { & '${workspaceFolder}\build-host\tests\unit_tests\unit_tests.exe' }

tasks.label: 4. Delete build Folders
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Name 'system_test', 'unit_tests' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; @('build', 'build-host', '.target_config') | ForEach-Object { if (Test-Path $_) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
